/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -O2 -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -frounding-math -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -L/home/jay/simulation_ws/src/bitstarbvp/build/gtest/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/jay/simulation_ws/src/bitstarbvp/build/gtest/gtest/src:/home/jay/simulation_ws/src/bitstarbvp/build/gtest/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
